CurrentIssues.ID: FunctionNaming:AppTextField.kt$@Composable fun AppTextField( value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, label: String? = null, placeholder: String? = null, errorMessage: String? = null, supportingText: String? = null, enabled: Boolean = true, readOnly: Boolean = false, singleLine: Boolean = true, minLines: Int = 1, maxLines: Int = if (singleLine) 1 else Int.MAX_VALUE, leadingIcon: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, trailingIcon: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, keyboardOptions: KeyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions.Default, keyboardActions: KeyboardActions = KeyboardActions.Default, visualTransformation: VisualTransformation = VisualTransformation.None, // extraSmall matches OutlinedTextField's own default shape â€” pinned here so every field shares one source. shape: Shape = MaterialTheme.shapes.extraSmall, colors: TextFieldColors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(), )

FunctionNaming:AppTextField.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun AppTextField( state: TextFieldState, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, label: String? = null, placeholder: String? = null, errorMessage: String? = null, supportingText: String? = null, enabled: Boolean = true, readOnly: Boolean = false, singleLine: Boolean = true, minLines: Int = 1, maxLines: Int = if (singleLine) 1 else Int.MAX_VALUE, leadingIcon: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, trailingIcon: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, keyboardOptions: KeyboardOptions = KeyboardOptions.Default, shape: Shape = MaterialTheme.shapes.extraSmall, colors: TextFieldColors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(), )
FunctionNaming:AttachmentChip.kt$@Composable fun AttachmentChip(att: PendingAttachment, onRemove: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier)
FunctionNaming:CappedScrollColumn.kt$@Composable fun CappedScrollColumn( maxHeight: Dp, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, content: @Composable ColumnScope.() -> Unit, )

FunctionNaming:ComponentChip.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class, ExperimentalFoundationApi::class) @Composable fun ComponentChip( label: String, kind: String, effective: Boolean, onClick: () -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, enabled: Boolean = true, readOnlyCaption: String? = null, onLongClick: (() -> Unit)? = null, )

FunctionNaming:FadingEdge.kt$@Composable fun FadingText( text: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, style: TextStyle = LocalTextStyle.current, color: Color = Color.Unspecified, fontWeight: FontWeight? = null, fontFamily: FontFamily? = null, fadeWidth: Dp = 28.dp, )

FunctionNaming:Markdown.kt$@Composable fun MarkdownText( md: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, codeBackground: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant, tableBackground: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface, tableHeaderBackground: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant, tableDivider: Color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant, )
FunctionNaming:Markdown.kt$@Composable private fun TableBlock(t: Block.Table, surface: Color, headerBackground: Color, divider: Color)

FunctionNaming:SearchBar.kt$@Composable fun SearchBar( query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, @Suppress("UNUSED_PARAMETER") searching: Boolean = false, onSearch: (() -> Unit)? = null, )
FunctionNaming:SectionCard.kt$@Composable fun SectionCard( title: String, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, trailing: (@Composable () -> Unit)? = null, content: @Composable ColumnScope.() -> Unit, )
FunctionNaming:SliderField.kt$@Composable fun FloatSliderField( label: String, value: () -> Float, onValueChange: (Float) -> Unit, valueRange: ClosedFloatingPointRange<Float> = 0f..1f, )

FunctionNaming:SliderField.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class) @Composable fun SliderField( label: String, options: List<Pair<String, String>>, value: String, onSelect: (String) -> Unit, // When true, label + slider recolor into workflow/ultracode violet (tween) AND the track // carries the looping ultracode ripple. Defaults off so non-accent sliders keep plain primary. accentActive: Boolean = false, // When true, label + slider recolor into theme error red (Permissions "Dangerous" notch). // Takes precedence over accentActive; tweened so sliding on/off animates instead of snapping. dangerActive: Boolean = false, )

FunctionNaming:StatusIndicator.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3ExpressiveApi::class) @Composable fun StatusIndicator( status: String, awaitingInput: Boolean? = null, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, size: Dp = 18.dp, accent: Color? = null, unread: Boolean = false, flashOnComplete: Boolean = true, )

FunctionNaming:VoiceDictationField.kt$@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3ExpressiveApi::class) @Composable fun VoiceDictationField( value: String, onValueChange: (String) -> Unit, modifier: Modifier = Modifier, placeholder: String = "", enabled: Boolean = true, maxLines: Int = 6, // Shape + colors forwarded to the inner AppTextField so a screen can give the dictation field // the same look as its other inputs. Defaults match AppTextField's own, so existing sites unchanged. shape: Shape = MaterialTheme.shapes.extraSmall, colors: TextFieldColors = OutlinedTextFieldDefaults.colors(), )
MaxLineLength:AnimateContentHeight.kt$/** Like [androidx.compose.animation.animateContentSize] but height-only â€” width snaps instantly so resize doesn't grow fillMaxWidth cards. */
MaxLineLength:FadingEdge.kt$/** Fade [width] px at left/right; [fadeStart]/[fadeEnd] evaluated at draw time so only the edge with off-screen content fades. */
MaxLineLength:Markdown.kt$Text(b.text, fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 13.sp, modifier = Modifier.padding(10.dp))
MaxLineLength:Markdown.kt$if (end >= 0) { withStyle(SpanStyle(fontFamily = FontFamily.Monospace, fontSize = 13.sp)) { append(s.substring(i + 1, end)) }; i = end + 1 } else { append(s[i]); i++ }
MaxLineLength:Markdown.kt$if (end >= 0) { withStyle(SpanStyle(fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold)) { append(s.substring(i + 2, end)) }; i = end + 2 } else { append(s[i]); i++ }
MaxLineLength:Markdown.kt$is Block.Heading -> Text(b.text, style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleSmall, fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold, modifier = Modifier.padding(top = 4.dp))
MaxLineLength:Markdown.kt$while (i < lines.size && lines[i].trimStart().startsWith("|")) { rows.add(cells(lines[i]).map { inline(it) }); i++ }
ReturnCount:QueryHighlight.kt$fun snippetAroundMatch(snippet: String, query: String, lead: Int = 10): String

UnusedPrivateProperty:Theme.kt$// Fixed M3 (Expressive) brand scheme â€” one unified BLUE family: primary/secondary/tertiary all blue tones; // error = semantic red; neutrals = blue-tinted greys. No device dynamic color. private val LightExpressive = lightColorScheme( primary = Color(0xFF1B61C8), onPrimary = Color.White, primaryContainer = Color(0xFFD6E3FF), onPrimaryContainer = Color(0xFF001B3D), secondary = Color(0xFF545F71), onSecondary = Color.White, secondaryContainer = Color(0xFFD8E3F8), onSecondaryContainer = Color(0xFF111C2B), // Tertiary: cornflower/royal blue accent (was teal) â€” same blue family as primary, slightly more saturated. tertiary = Color(0xFF3B5CA8), onTertiary = Color.White, tertiaryContainer = Color(0xFFDAE2FF), onTertiaryContainer = Color(0xFF001A43), error = Color(0xFFBA1A1A), onError = Color.White, errorContainer = Color(0xFFFFDAD6), onErrorContainer = Color(0xFF410002), background = Color(0xFFF8FAFF), onBackground = Color(0xFF191C20), surface = Color(0xFFF8FAFF), onSurface = Color(0xFF191C20), surfaceTint = Color(0xFF1B61C8), surfaceVariant = Color(0xFFDBE2EF), onSurfaceVariant = Color(0xFF424751), surfaceContainerLowest = Color(0xFFFFFFFF), surfaceContainerLow = Color(0xFFEFF3FB), surfaceContainer = Color(0xFFE9EEF7), surfaceContainerHigh = Color(0xFFE3E9F3), surfaceContainerHighest = Color(0xFFDEE4EF), outline = Color(0xFF72777F), outlineVariant = Color(0xFFC2C7D2), )
